title: Yoofoss Muslin Baby Bibs 10 Pack Dribble Bandana Bibs 100% Cotton Drool Bib for Teething Soft and Absorbent with Adjustable Snaps Blue and Orange …
features: 🎄【100% Muslin Cotton Bibs】Discover the incredible comfort of our soft muslin cotton bibs, made entirely from 100% gentle muslin cotton. Unlike regular cotton, muslin's unique properties enable exceptional temperature regulation, guaranteeing your baby's comfort and coziness throughout the day, even during sweltering summers.

🎄【6 Layers Super Absorption】Experience the excellence of our 6-layer muslin bibs, carefully engineered to be softer, gentler, and more absorbent than ever before. Bid adieu to spills, drooling, and the challenges of teething, as these bibs expertly gather and retain liquids, ensuring your baby remains dry and at ease throughout the day.

🎄【3 Sizes Adjustable Snaps】Our Adjustable Bandana Bibs are designed with your baby's comfort in mind. Each bib is equipped with two sets of snaps, providing adjustable sizing options to fit your baby's neck, ranging from 12.5 to 15 inches. The sturdy snaps keep these drool bibs securely fastened, allowing your baby to explore and grow without any worries about them being pulled off.

🎄【Nice choice】 As a parent, caring for a newborn is both exciting and challenging. This is a practical and safe product. It can be your right-hand man in caring for your baby, providing a safe and comfortable growth environment for you and your baby.

🎄【Functional and Easy to Care】Our baby bibs for boys and girls are as versatile as they are stylish. In addition to their primary purpose, they can also be used as burp cloths, washcloths, and wipe clothes. Crafted with enduring durability, these bibs can handle the wear and tear of teething and drooling. When it comes to cleaning, you'll have no trouble as they can be effortlessly hand-washed or machine washed.
description: Product Description Yoofoss 10 Pack Muslin Baby Bibs Natural Designs, Great Drooling Bibs for your baby. The measurement between 123.5-15" to fit baby's different grow stage. Soft, Breathable and Skin-friendly Thickness-6 layers of muslin Breathable-No longer sweat Natural-Pure muslin cotton Highly absorbent ,quickly dry Previous page Next page 1 Feeding 2 Burping 3 Drooling 4 Decorating 5 Pets Best gift for newborn parents. What are the measurements of the neck of the bib? Fit for baby's neck circumference between 12.5-15.5In What are these baby bibs made of? Both of the front and back of our baby bibs are made of pure muslin cotton. Does the bib get hot in summer? The natural muslin yarn material is super breathable for hot summer use. What about its absorbency? Thicken 6-layer muslin provides higher absorbency for your drooling baby. Can I use it for my pets? Our baby bibs can be also used for little dog and cat, it will be more cute when wearing our bibs.
